_comment: Liquid template for Hightouch HTTP Request sync → POST /api/ingest/users — funnel_stage: new_user (New / onboarding users). Paste into the JSON editor in the sync configuration.
_notes: funnel_stage is hardcoded to 'new_user' — this template is for the new user onboarding audience.
Priority: external_user_id (verified users) → braze_id (unverified users). The ingest route handles the fallback logic.
external_user_id uses default: '' so it renders as empty string when absent — the route treats empty string as absent and falls back to braze_id.
New users are most likely to be unverified (no external_user_id) — braze_id is critical for this audience.
last_seen_at is typically the install date for new users — preferred send time is set from this.
plan_finish_lifetime_count and badge_lifetime_count will be 0 for most new users.
donor_alias_ids_all must be quoted as a string — some users have multiple IDs.
preferred_bible_version_id uses default: 'null' (unquoted) so it renders as JSON null.
_template:
{
  "users": [
    {% for row in rows %}
    {
      "external_user_id": "{{ row['user_id'] | default: '' }}",
      "braze_id": "{{ row['braze_id'] | default: '' }}",
      "funnel_stage": "new_user",
      "attributes": {
        "first_name": "{{ row['first_name'] }}",
        "last_name": "{{ row['last_name'] }}",
        "email": "{{ row['email'] }}",
        "last_seen_at": "{{ row['last_seen_timestamp'] }}",
        "language_tag": "{{ row['language_tag'] }}",
        "plan_locale": "{{ row['plan_locale_latest'] }}",
        "preferred_bible_version_id": {{ row['text_bible_version_id_latest'] | default: "null" }},
        "donor_alias_ids": "{{ row['donor_alias_ids_all'] }}",
        "source_application": "{{ row['source_application'] }}",
        "verified": {{ row['verified_flag'] | default: false }},
        "suspended_at": "{{ row['suspended_timestamp'] }}",
        "giving_tier": "{{ row['giving_tier'] | default: '' }}",
        "plan_day_current_month_count": {{ row['plan_day_current_month_count'] | default: 0 }},
        "plan_finish_lifetime_count": {{ row['plan_finish_lifetime_count'] | default: 0 }},
        "plan_day_current_year_count": {{ row['plan_day_current_year_count'] | default: 0 }},
        "plan_day_last_plan_id": "{{ row['plan_day_last_plan_id'] | default: '' }}",
        "gp_current_month_count": {{ row['gp_current_month_count'] | default: 0 }},
        "gs_current_month_count": {{ row['gs_current_month_count'] | default: 0 }},
        "badge_lifetime_count": {{ row['badge_lifetime_count'] | default: 0 }},
        "days_since_last_open": {{ row['days_since_last_open'] | default: "null" }},
        "preferred_channel_30d": "{{ row['Preferred Channel Overall 30 Days'] }}",
        "preferred_channel_90d": "{{ row['Preferred Channel Overall 90 Days'] }}",
        "has_recurring_gift": {{ row['Has Active Recurring Gift to the YouVersion Fund'] | default: false }},
        "gifts_count_3_36mo": {{ row['Gifts Given within the past 3 to 36 Months'] | default: 0 }}
      }
    }{% unless forloop.last %},{% endunless %}
    {% endfor %}
  ]
}
